# jeremycode.com — Fintech Tools Directory

A curated, searchable, technically-opinionated directory of fintech infrastructure tools
for developers, product teams, and founders.

## Purpose

jeremycode.com helps engineers evaluate and compare fintech APIs across verticals including
stablecoins, payments, KYC, lending, banking infrastructure, and compliance.

## Navigation

- /              Homepage with featured tools across verticals
- /tools         Full directory with filtering by vertical, category, region, and attributes
- /tools/[slug]  Individual tool detail page with expert commentary
- /[vertical]    Landing page for a specific fintech vertical
- /[vertical]/[category]  Tools scoped to a category within a vertical
- /compare/[a-vs-b]  Side-by-side tool comparison
- /region/[slug] Tools operating in a specific geographic region
- /for/[use-case] Cross-vertical tools for a specific use case
- /learn         Articles and videos from Jeremy Code
- /about         About Jeremy Code

## Content Structure

Each tool listing includes: name, tagline, description, vertical, category, API availability,
SDK languages, pricing model, supported regions, expert takes, and vertical-specific attributes
(e.g. supported chains for stablecoin tools).

Expert takes are multi-author commentary sections. Jeremy is the primary expert.

## Verticals (data-driven, updated via admin)

See /sitemap.xml for a complete list of all active verticals, categories, and tools.
